flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at New Jersey Institute of Technology rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.0k → $20.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at New Jersey Institute of Technology rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.0k → $37.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at New Jersey Institute of Technology fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at New Jersey Institute of Technology are 39% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($84.3k vs $60.7k).
